properties.name: exam.events.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange for exam-service events consumed by search_service.

properties.name: exam.events.file-uploaded-routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used by exam_service when publishing uploaded-source events.

properties.name: exam.events.sync-routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used for exam sync upsert/delete events.

properties.name: search.events.queue
properties.description: Queue used by AI extraction listener to consume uploaded-source events.

properties.name: search.events.ai-extracted-routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used by search_service to publish AI extraction results back.

properties.name: search.sync.queue
properties.description: Queue used by search index synchronization listener.

properties.name: gemini.api.key
properties.description: Google Gemini API key used for extraction requests.
